html:
The world! EVAngelion JAZZ night
=The Tokyo III Jazz club=
Publisher
  • Japan King Records/Starchild
Release Date
  • Japan December 24, 2014
Media Type Audio CD
Author Shiro Sagisu

The world! EVAngelion JAZZ night =The Tokyo III Jazz club= is an album consisting of jazz arrangements of songs from the Neon Genesis Evangelion TV series, the movie The End of Evangelion, and pieces from some of the Rebuild movies (3.0 had come out two years before). It was released by Starchild on December 24, 2014. The cover was drawn by Hideaki Anno's wife Moyoco. Lyrics for two (originally instrumental) scores and Japanese lyrics for Komm, süsser Tod were written and sung by Megumi Hayashibara. The Freedom Gospel Choir consists of Loren, her sister Evette Briscoe, Paul Lee and Ian Michael G. Pitter, who also serves as the emcee. The Triangle Opera, aka "Our Special Choir" consists of Catherine Bott, Deborah Miles-Johnson, Andrew Busher and Michael George.

Track Listing[edit]

All music composed by Shiro Sagisu unless otherwise noted. Arranged by Shiro Sagisu, Masamichi Amano and Miho Hazama.
